history.text: Colombia gained a degree of political autonomy.
Colombia declared independence or statehood, marking a decisive political break.
Colombia achieved the political status recorded for this period.
Gran Colombia appears in Colombia's historical record.
The current constitution came into force, setting the basic framework for today's Colombia.
